# PrivatePaycheck
> Free paycheck and income tax calculator for US workers 2026. All 50 states. Federal + state taxes, FICA, 401k, HSA. 100% private — no data stored.

## Calculators
- https://www.privatepaycheck.com/ : Free Paycheck Calculator 2026 — all 50 states, federal + state tax
- https://www.privatepaycheck.com/federal-paycheck-calculator : Federal paycheck calculator 2026 — IRS brackets, FICA, W-4
- https://www.privatepaycheck.com/hourly-paycheck-calculator : Hourly paycheck calculator 2026 — hourly to annual, all states
- https://www.privatepaycheck.com/1099-paycheck-calculator : 1099 self-employment tax calculator 2026 — SE tax 15.3%
- https://www.privatepaycheck.com/bonus-tax-calculator : Bonus tax calculator 2026 — supplemental rate 22%
- https://www.privatepaycheck.com/overtime-calculator : Overtime paycheck calculator 2026 — $12,500 deduction
- https://www.privatepaycheck.com/no-tax-on-overtime-deduction : No Tax on Overtime calculator — One Big Beautiful Bill
- https://www.privatepaycheck.com/no-tax-on-tips-calculator : No Tax on Tips calculator — $25,000 cap 2026
- https://www.privatepaycheck.com/tips-tax-calculator-2026 : Tips tax calculator 2026 — annual savings estimate
- https://www.privatepaycheck.com/raise-calculator : Raise calculator 2026 — after-tax impact of salary increase
- https://www.privatepaycheck.com/signing-bonus-tax-calculator : Signing bonus tax calculator 2026
- https://www.privatepaycheck.com/two-jobs-tax-calculator : Two jobs tax calculator 2026 — combined withholding
- https://www.privatepaycheck.com/w4-withholding-calculator : W-4 withholding calculator 2026
- https://www.privatepaycheck.com/senior-deduction-calculator : Senior $6,000 deduction calculator 2026
- https://www.privatepaycheck.com/trump-account-calculator : Trump Account calculator 2026
- https://www.privatepaycheck.com/wep-lump-sum-calculator : WEP lump sum calculator 2026
- https://www.privatepaycheck.com/compare-states-paycheck : Compare paycheck by state 2026 — side by side
- https://www.privatepaycheck.com/minimum-wage : Minimum wage by state 2026
- https://www.privatepaycheck.com/unemployment-calculator : Unemployment calculator 2026

## State Paycheck Calculators
- https://www.privatepaycheck.com/california-paycheck-calculator : California paycheck calculator 2026 — CA tax up to 13.3%
- https://www.privatepaycheck.com/texas-paycheck-calculator : Texas paycheck calculator 2026 — no state income tax
- https://www.privatepaycheck.com/new-york-paycheck-calculator : New York paycheck calculator 2026 — NYC tax included
- https://www.privatepaycheck.com/florida-paycheck-calculator : Florida paycheck calculator 2026 — no state income tax
- https://www.privatepaycheck.com/illinois-paycheck-calculator : Illinois paycheck calculator 2026 — flat 4.95%
- https://www.privatepaycheck.com/ohio-paycheck-calculator : Ohio paycheck calculator 2026
- https://www.privatepaycheck.com/georgia-paycheck-calculator : Georgia paycheck calculator 2026 — flat 5.49%
- https://www.privatepaycheck.com/arizona-paycheck-calculator : Arizona paycheck calculator 2026 — flat 2.5%
- https://www.privatepaycheck.com/colorado-paycheck-calculator : Colorado paycheck calculator 2026 — flat 4.4%
- https://www.privatepaycheck.com/washington-paycheck-calculator : Washington paycheck calculator 2026 — no state tax
- https://www.privatepaycheck.com/virginia-paycheck-calculator : Virginia paycheck calculator 2026
- https://www.privatepaycheck.com/massachusetts-paycheck-calculator : Massachusetts paycheck calculator 2026 — flat 5%
- https://www.privatepaycheck.com/north-carolina-paycheck-calculator : North Carolina paycheck calculator 2026 — flat 4.5%
- https://www.privatepaycheck.com/michigan-paycheck-calculator : Michigan paycheck calculator 2026 — flat 4.25%
- https://www.privatepaycheck.com/pennsylvania-paycheck-calculator : Pennsylvania paycheck calculator 2026 — flat 3.07%
- https://www.privatepaycheck.com/new-jersey-paycheck-calculator : New Jersey paycheck calculator 2026
- https://www.privatepaycheck.com/maryland-paycheck-calculator : Maryland paycheck calculator 2026
- https://www.privatepaycheck.com/minnesota-paycheck-calculator : Minnesota paycheck calculator 2026
- https://www.privatepaycheck.com/nevada-paycheck-calculator : Nevada paycheck calculator 2026 — no state income tax
- https://www.privatepaycheck.com/oregon-paycheck-calculator : Oregon paycheck calculator 2026

## Key Tax Numbers 2026
- Federal standard deduction: $15,000 single / $30,000 MFJ
- FICA: Social Security 6.2% (wage base $184,500) + Medicare 1.45%
- No Tax on Tips cap: $25,000
- No Tax on Overtime deduction: $12,500
- 401k contribution limit: $23,500
- HSA limit: $4,300 single / $8,550 family
- Senior deduction (65+): $6,000 (phases out at $75K single / $150K MFJ)
